name: Stir-Fried Snow Peas (Disney Kids)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh snow peas, rinsed and stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the sesame oil in a frying pan or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ginger, snow peas, water chestnuts, and soy sauce.
3. Stir-fry for about 3 to 5 minutes, or until the peas turn bright green.
4. Serves 4 to 6.
